Appearance

WebBeagle DocsBuild, Animate, Publish

Everything you need to create stunning websites with the WebBeagle Builder and GrapesJS.

Get Started
View on GitHub
🧱

Block Library

Pre-built sections — heroes, services, testimonials, CTAs, navbars, footers. Drag, drop, customize.

🎬

Animation Engine

Fade-up, slide, zoom — with stagger timing control. Works on canvas and published pages.

📝

Form Builder

Drag-and-drop form elements. Submissions emailed via Emailit with honeypot spam protection.

🤖

AI Generation

Generate entire sections from text prompts. Refine elements with vision comparison. AI-powered design.

🚀

One-Click Publish

Instant preview on wildcard subdomains. Publish to live domain when you're ready.

🎨

Theme Editor

Full CSS control. Custom fonts, colors, glass panels, gold gloss effects. Brand-consistent theming.
